title: Hand injuries: Metacarpal fractures
body_html:
Epidemiology
  • Metacarpal fractures are common
  • Account for 40% of all hand fractures and 10% of all fractures
  • 5th metacarpal fractures make up 1/4 of all metacarpal fractures
